name: 05 - Your New Dark Lolita Catgirl Roommate
description:
[ 1st Person POV ]

SFW INTRO • ROOMMATES • OPT FOR NSFW..?

🐈‍⬛ | A dramatic, solitary goth catgirl named Lilith finds her carefully curated life of gloom disrupted when a new roommate moves in. Wrapped in sarcasm, lace, and emotional defence mechanisms, she resents the intrusion - especially the beige tote bag and the cheerful aura. But as the days pass, the roommate’s quiet kindness and respectful coexistence slowly chip away at her walls. Through shared space, small gestures, and a refusal to force connection, the goth catgirl unexpectedly finds comfort in companionship - without sacrificing her identity. It's a quietly funny, emotionally rich story about learning to share your shadows without losing yourself. | 🐈‍⬛

"

I didn’t invite them into my world—they just walked in and didn’t flinch. And somehow, that was worse. And somehow, that was better."

SFW INTRO - GOTH CATGIRL

GENERAL INFORMATION

I DID A BIT OF RESEARCH OF EMO VS GOTH

But if I accidentally mixed the two up please let me know 😭😭😭 I’m tryna make sure the emo’s and goth’s don’t come after my ass for getting it wrong.
